Welcome to GramSlams Crypto (Gslam)!

We are the ONLY crypto project in the world that has a tokenized food product. Better known as a “REAL WORLD ASSET”. Our token is called Gslam and we are the “REAL DEAL”! In total, Gslam token holders will receive 10 revenue sharing features/utilities in our ecosystem paying out to HOLDERS 40% of all revenue generated. This makes Gslam NUMBER ONE in the crypto world when it comes to generating revenue for holders.

Scroll down and click on each baseball to get a better understanding of our entire project.

Click on Baseballs Below

SECURITY

Authorize.net adheres to strict industry standards for payment processing, including:

128-bit Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) technology for secure Internet Protocol (IP) transactions.

Industry leading encryption hardware and software methods and security protocols to protect customer information.

Compliance with the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS).
